items.raw_excerpt: ASI decodes three 15th-16th century Telugu inscriptions from Nallamala Forest, revealing historical details about local temples and figures.
items.summary_en: India's ASI has decoded three Telugu inscriptions from the 15th-16th centuries discovered in Nallamala Forest. The inscriptions reveal historical details about local temples and figures from the region.
items.summary_ko: 인도 고고학청(ASI)이 나말라 숲에서 발견된 세 개의 15~16세기 텔루구어 비문을 해독했습니다. 이 비문에는 지역 사원과 인물들에 대한 역사적 세부 내용이 담겨 있습니다.
items.title_en: Indian archaeologists decipher ancient inscriptions found in Nallamala Forest
items.title_ko: 인도 나말라 숲에서 발견된 15세기 비문, 고고학청이 해독
items.title_original: ASI deciphers inscriptions discovered in Nallamala forest dating to 15th century

items.raw_excerpt: No arguing. This phrase makes your point clear, and that's that.
items.summary_en: 'Punto e basta' means 'period, end of story' in Italian. Italians use this firm phrase to shut down an argument and make their point clear. It leaves no space for discussion.
items.summary_ko: 'Punto e basta'는 이탈리아어로 '마침표, 그게 끝이다'라는 뜻이다. 이탈리아인들은 논쟁을 끝내고 자기 의견을 분명히 전할 때 이 표현을 쓴다. 더 이상 토론할 여지를 남기지 않는 강한 표현이다.
items.title_en: Italian expression of the day: 'Punto e basta'
items.title_original: Italian expression of the day: 'Punto e basta'

items.raw_excerpt: The Dutch state forestry service plans to close all seven of its visitor centres, saying it needs to prioritise spending on managing nature reserves. The centres, at De Pelen, Almeerderhout, the Oostvaardersplassen, the Schoorlse Duinen, the Sallandse Heuvelrug, the Drents-Friese Wold and the Boomkroonpad on the Hondsrug, draw around 1.3 million visitors a year but are not breaking even. They were funded by the central government until 2014. When that subsidy ended, the forestry service took ove
items.summary_en: The Dutch forestry service will close all seven of its visitor centres. The centres get 1.3 million visitors each year but lose money. A government subsidy ended in 2014 and the centres never recovered.
items.summary_ko: 네덜란드 국유림 관리청이 운영하는 방문자 센터 7곳이 모두 문을 닫는다. 연간 130만 명이 찾지만 적자를 면치 못했고, 2014년 정부 보조금 중단 이후 재정난이 계속됐다.
items.title_en: All Dutch forest visitor centres to close over money issues
items.title_ko: 네덜란드 국유림 방문자 센터 7곳, 자금난으로 전면 폐쇄
items.title_original: All Dutch forest visitor centres to close due to funding

items.raw_excerpt: Supermarket chain Lidl has been ordered to pay €170,000 compensation to a manager who was unfairly dismissed after 17 years’ service. The man was accused of doctoring the working hours register so that employees at the branch in Rotterdam, but the city’s district court said there was evidence of fraud. He admitted that he had removed hours worked by his staff from the system, but he told the court he did so because they would otherwise have been rejected by...
items.summary_en: A Lidl manager in Rotterdam was unfairly dismissed after 17 years and awarded €170,000 in compensation. He admitted removing hours from staff records but said the system would have rejected them. The court found no evidence of fraud.
items.summary_ko: 로테르담 리들 매장에서 17년간 일한 관리자가 부당 해고돼 법원으로부터 17만 유로(약 2억5천만원)의 보상금을 받게 됐다. 그는 직원 근무 시간을 삭제한 사실은 인정했지만, 본사에서 거부할 시간이어서 어쩔 수 없는 조치였다고 주장했다. 법원은 사기 증거가 부족하다고 판단했다.
items.title_en: Lidl manager fired for fraud wins €170,000 in unfair dismissal case
items.title_ko: '근무시간 조작' 해고된 리들 매니저, 법원 "부당해고"…2억5천만원 배상 판결
items.title_original: Lidl manager sacked over “fraud” awarded €170K compensation

items.raw_excerpt: Police in Belagavi take action against animal cruelty during a race, following PETA's tip-off and public outcry.
items.summary_en: Police in Belagavi, Karnataka have taken action against animal cruelty during a local race. The move followed a tip-off from PETA and public outrage over the treatment of animals.
items.summary_ko: 카르나타카주 벨라가비에서 열린 지역 경주 중 동물 학대 행위가 적발돼 경찰이 조치에 나섰다. PETA의 제보와 시민들의 공분이 경찰의 움직임을 이끌어낸 것으로 알려졌다.
items.title_en: Police act on animal cruelty during race in Belagavi
items.title_ko: 벨라가비 경주 중 동물 학대에 경찰 대응
items.title_original: Police initiate action over cruelty to animals in Belagavi

items.raw_excerpt: Calicut University seeks to extend guest faculty tenure until March 2027 to maintain academic continuity and support teaching programs.
items.summary_en: Calicut University in Kerala, India, seeks to keep guest faculty until March 2027. The move aims to maintain academic continuity and support teaching programs. The university administration proposed the extension.
items.summary_ko: 인도 케랄라주 캘리컷 대학교가 2027년 3월까지 객원 교수진의 임기를 연장하려 한다. 이는 학사 일정과 교육의 연속성을 유지하기 위한 조치다. 대학 행정부가 임기 연장을 제안했다.
items.title_en: Calicut University wants to extend guest faculty tenure until 2027
items.title_ko: 캘리컷 대학교, 객원 교수 임기를 2027년까지 연장 추진
items.title_original: Extension of tenure sought for guest faculty in Calicut varsity
